task_description: Scan the guest bedside table (location 14) to check for the presence of the medicine jar. If found, proceed to bar counter for water; if not found, retrieve from hallway storage cabinet.
post_scan_instruction: 先掃描，掃描後逐項插入後續任務。若看到藥罐，去吧台倒一杯溫水並送到長輩房；若沒看到藥罐，先去走廊收納櫃拿藥罐，再去吧台倒一杯溫水並送到長輩房。

llm_raw_subtasks.description: Open the hallway storage cabinet to access the medicine jar.
Pick up the medicine jar from the hallway storage cabinet.
Close the hallway storage cabinet after retrieving the medicine jar.
Pick up a drink cup from the bar counter.
Use the water dispenser to fill the drink cup with warm water.
Place the drink cup with warm water on the guest bedside table.

normalized_subtasks.description: Open the hallway storage cabinet to access the medicine jar.
Pick up the medicine jar from the hallway storage cabinet.
Close the hallway storage cabinet after retrieving the medicine jar.
Pick up a drink cup from the bar counter.
Use the water dispenser to fill the drink cup with warm water.
Place the drink cup with warm water on the guest bedside table.

task_description: Scan the guest bedside table (location 14) to check for the presence of the medicine jar.
post_scan_instruction: 先掃描，掃描後逐項插入後續任務。若看到藥罐，將其拿給長輩，等待30秒後，再把藥罐拿去流理台用抹布擦拭後放回收納櫃；若沒看到藥罐，去浴室洗手台找，找到後再將其拿給長輩，等待30秒後，再把藥罐拿去流理台用抹布擦拭後放回收納櫃。

task_description: Scan the small round side table (location 3) to identify items. If empty juice or mineral water is found, take them to the sink counter to dispose. Otherwise, get a new wet wipe from the hallway storage cabinet and place it on the table.
post_scan_instruction: 先掃描，掃描後逐項插入後續任務。若看到空果汁或礦泉水，拿去流理台丟掉；若沒看到空果汁或礦泉水，直接拿一包新的濕紙巾過去放著。

llm_raw_subtasks.description: Open the hallway storage cabinet to access the wet wipe.
Pick up a new wet wipe from the hallway storage cabinet.
Close the hallway storage cabinet after picking up the wet wipe.
Place the new wet wipe on the small round side table.

normalized_subtasks.description: Open the hallway storage cabinet to access the wet wipe.
Pick up a new wet wipe from the hallway storage cabinet.
Close the hallway storage cabinet after picking up the wet wipe.
Place the new wet wipe on the small round side table.

task_description: Scan the guest bedside table (location 14) to check for the presence of the medicine jar. If found, deliver it to the elder; if not found, search at the sink counter.
post_scan_instruction: 先掃描，掃描後逐項插入後續任務。若看到藥罐，將其拿給長輩；若沒看到藥罐，去浴室洗手台找，然後將其拿給長輩。等待 30 秒後，再把藥罐拿去流理台用抹布擦拭後放回收納櫃。

llm_raw_subtasks.description: Pick up the medicine jar from the sink counter.
Deliver the medicine jar to the elder at the guest bedside table.
Wait for 30 seconds after delivering the medicine jar.
Pick up the medicine jar from the guest bedside table after waiting.
Pick up a cloth from the hallway storage cabinet.
Wipe the medicine jar at the sink counter using the cloth.
Place the cleaned medicine jar back into the hallway storage cabinet.

task_description: Scan the master desk (location 13) for the presence of glasses_case. If found, exchange with keyring at entry_shoe_cabinet (location 18). If not found, no further actions.
post_scan_instruction: 先掃描，掃描後逐項插入後續任務。若看到眼鏡盒，執行：將眼鏡盒從主臥書桌拿到玄關鞋櫃，並將鞋櫃上的鑰匙串拿回主臥書桌；若沒看到眼鏡盒，執行：不進行任何物品移動。

task_description: Scan the dining table to identify items. Based on the scan, sort non-dining items to the coffee table and dining items to the sink counter.
post_scan_instruction: 先掃描，掃描後逐項插入後續任務。若看到不是餐具的東西（如遙控器、鑰匙串），將它們放到茶几上；若看到餐具（杯子、碗），將它們收回流理台。

task_description: Scan the guest bedside table (location 14) to check for the presence of the medicine jar. If found, proceed to bar counter for water; if not found, retrieve from hallway storage cabinet.
post_scan_instruction: 先掃描，掃描後逐項插入後續任務。若看到藥罐，去吧台倒一杯溫水並送到長輩房；若沒看到藥罐，先去走廊收納櫃拿藥罐，再去吧台倒一杯溫水並送到長輩房。

llm_raw_subtasks.description: Open the hallway storage cabinet to access the medicine jar.
Pick up the medicine jar from the hallway storage cabinet.
Close the hallway storage cabinet after retrieving the medicine jar.
Pick up a drink cup from the bar counter.
Use the water dispenser to fill the drink cup with warm water.
Place the drink cup with warm water on the guest bedside table.

normalized_subtasks.description: Open the hallway storage cabinet to access the medicine jar.
Pick up the medicine jar from the hallway storage cabinet.
Close the hallway storage cabinet after retrieving the medicine jar.
Pick up a drink cup from the bar counter.
Use the water dispenser to fill the drink cup with warm water.
Place the drink cup with warm water on the guest bedside table.

task_description: Scan the coffee table for scissors. If found, pick up and use to cut open cookie packaging on dining table; if not found, execute alternative tasks.
post_scan_instruction: 先掃描，掃描後逐項插入後續任務。若看到 scissors，執行將其拿起並剪開 dining_table 上的 cookie 包裝；若沒看到 scissors，執行其他任務。最後將 scissors 放回 tv_cabinet 的 drawer 並關上。

llm_raw_subtasks.description: Open the hallway storage cabinet to access the medicine jar.

normalized_subtasks.description: Open the hallway storage cabinet to access the medicine jar.
Pick up the medicine jar from the hallway storage cabinet.
Close the hallway storage cabinet after retrieving the medicine jar.
Pick up the drink cup from the bar counter.
Use the water dispenser to fill the drink cup with warm water.
Place the drink cup with warm water on the guest bedside table.

task_description: Scan the coffee table to identify items. If mineral_water or cola is found, retrieve them to the sink_counter. If not found, skip retrieval. Finally, place the remote_control back to the tv_cabinet.
post_scan_instruction: 先掃描，掃描後逐項插入後續任務。若看到礦泉水或可樂，逐一收回流理台；若沒看到礦泉水或可樂，跳過此步驟。最後，將遙控器放回電視櫃。

llm_raw_subtasks.description: Place the remote_control back to the tv_cabinet.

normalized_subtasks.description: Place the remote_control back to the tv_cabinet.

task_description: Scan the bar counter (location 5) to check for mineral water. If found, pour into cup; if not, fetch from fridge.
post_scan_instruction: Take the cup from the master desk to the bar counter. 先掃描，掃描後逐項插入後續任務。若看到 mineral_water，執行倒水進杯子；若沒看到 mineral_water，執行去冰箱拿礦泉水倒水。最後把滿杯的水送回主臥。

llm_raw_subtasks.description: Pick up the drink cup from the bar counter.
Pick up the mineral water from the fridge.
Pour mineral water into the drink cup.
Place the filled drink cup on the master desk.

normalized_subtasks.description: Pick up the drink cup from the bar counter.
Pick up the mineral water from the fridge.
Pour mineral water into the drink cup.
Place the filled drink cup on the master desk.
